response.justification: Despite strong full-stack and geospatial experience via GISCollective, the candidate lacks direct C++ or Rust experience in commercial routing/navigation pipelines, has no demonstrated work with routing tiling, map data transformation, or distributed systems for global navigation data, and their primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang — none of which match the core requirement of modern C++ for this role.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and deliver complex systems
Strong background in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling best practices
concerns: No evidence of professional C++ or Rust development in routing or geospatial pipelines
Lacks experience with routing tile generation, map data optimization, or navigation data freshness systems
Primary language exposure is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not the required C++ core
